commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional skip-plugin-validation path to runtime config loading and uses it for non-local TUI startup.

Reproducibility: no. I did not establish a high-confidence live timing reproduction. Source inspection does confirm that current main reaches synchronous plugin-aware config validation before remote TUI connection, matching the reported root-cause path.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the compatibility tradeoff and optional real timing proof, not an automated repair.

target.title: perf(tui): skip plugin-aware config validation on remote TUI startup
target.body:
## Summary

- Cold `openclaw tui` against a remote gateway froze the TUI's event loop for 15–40s after first render. Root cause: `getRuntimeConfig()` at `src/tui/tui.ts` calls `loadConfig()` → `validateConfigObjectWithPlugins()` → `loadPluginMetadataSnapshot()` synchronously, pulling the full plugin metadata snapshot (200k+ sync file reads) onto the TUI's main thread.
- The TUI doesn't need plugin metadata in remote mode — it queries the gateway over RPC for models, slash commands, agents. The work was done purely to plugin-validate the config, then thrown away.
- `createConfigIO` already supports `pluginValidation: "skip"` (used by `readConfigFileSnapshot`); it just wasn't reachable from the runtime entrypoints.
- This PR threads an opt-in `skipPluginValidation` through `getRuntimeConfig` / `loadConfig` and has the TUI pass `skipPluginValidation: !isLocalMode`. Remote mode skips plugin validation; embedded (`--local`) mode is unchanged since the in-process agent runtime still needs the validated config.

## Verification

- `pnpm tsgo:core --noEmit` clean
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui.test.ts` → 46/46 pass
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/io.meta.test.ts src/config/runtime-snapshot.test.ts` → 10/10 pass

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: TUI event-loop freeze after first render during cold `openclaw tui` startup
- **Real environment tested**: not yet — local unit tests only (see Verification). Manual cold-start timing pending.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `pnpm tsgo:core --noEmit`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/io.meta.test.ts src/config/runtime-snapshot.test.ts`
- **Evidence after fix**: typecheck clean; 56/56 targeted tests pass
- **Observed result after fix**: code path verified via tests; user-visible "time from first render to first responsive keystroke" measurement still to run
- **What was not tested**: end-to-end manual `openclaw tui` cold-start timing against a warm gateway; `--local` mode regression sweep; behavior when `openclaw.json` references plugins that don't exist (errors that previously surfaced at TUI startup will now only surface gateway-side / on first plugin use in remote mode)

## Notes

- `loadPinnedRuntimeConfig` pins the first successful load as the process snapshot. In remote-mode TUI processes nothing else needs full plugin validation, so the pinned skipped snapshot is fine. In `--local` mode, the TUI doesn't pass the skip flag, so full validation runs and is pinned as before.
- This is part of a broader effort (see `dallin-perf-startup-trace`) to reduce plugin-related cold-start cost. Those wins make `loadPluginMetadataSnapshot` faster; this PR removes the call from the TUI's path entirely in remote mode.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
